patch.value: preflightExtension(blueprint, options) — pure unified author-time analyzer (compose.ts)

Add the pure synchronous capstone to src/sdk/compose.ts. Given a blueprint and { identity?, target?, declaredCapabilities? }, runs lintExtensionBlueprint, optionally synthesizes the manifest (when identity given), optionally runs checkExtensionManifestCompatibility against the synthesized/blueprint bounds (when target given), and returns ExtensionPreflightReport { ok, capabilities, blueprint, manifest, compatibility, findings } where findings are tagged by source (blueprint|compatibility). Reuses blueprintResult.used to avoid a second deriveExtensionCapabilities call.

author: claude-code-agent
message: Link analyzer task to the sibling compat analyzer + the legs it composes

patch.value: Added pure synchronous preflightExtension(blueprint, options) returning ExtensionPreflightReport { ok, capabilities, blueprint, manifest, compatibility, findings }. Runs lintExtensionBlueprint always; synthesizes manifest when identity given; runs checkExtensionManifestCompatibility against synthesized/blueprint bounds when target given. Findings are flattened + source-tagged (blueprint|compatibility); the now-moot manifest_capabilities_absent advisory is curated out of the consolidated view once a manifest is synthesized (raw lint kept on report.blueprint). Reuses blueprintResult.used (no second derive).
One-call author-time analyzer unifying the three separate checks.
Delivered; 100% covered; barrel re-export via export * from compose.js.
